title: The Road to Sabaody: Turning Point
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Duval, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #1, Robin, Unknown person #8, Whitebeard as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #1, Robin, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Have a taste of my anger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: I'll show you!! Don't be too surprised!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's fine! Take a good look....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'be been waiting fo dis day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But finding you... was too difficult...
